intent: Execute a sequence of external-effect steps where each step's compensation is registered BEFORE the step runs; on failure at step k, execute compensations k-1..1 in reverse order and report the unwind.

state.steps: array of { step_id, tool_ref, action, compensation: { tool_ref, action, args }, status: pending|done|failed|compensated }
state.compensation_log: append-only record of registered and executed compensations

edges.when: every step declares a compensation (validated at load — a step without one rejects the saga)
step done: register next step's compensation, then run it
unwind finished — outcome: unwound; or a compensation itself failed — outcome: partially_unwound, escalate with the remaining trail

termination: completed, unwound, or partially_unwound — partially_unwound always escalates to a human with the compensation_log and the steps still standing
